BRAZIL-SOUTH COAST.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1600Z TO 1800Z DAILY
   22 AND 23 SEP:
   A. IN AREA BOUND BY
      23-02.03S 043-51.03W, 23-02.00S 043-35.03W,
      23-04.03S 043-35.03W, 23-05.03S 043-51.03W.
   B. WITHIN 5.5 MILES OF 23-04.03S 043-52.03W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 231900Z SEP 14.
